description: Gold labels for the local 10-manuscript CS/AI rule-precision smoke set. These labels evaluate submission-readiness checks, not scientific merit.

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: The manuscript topic involves neural sequence models; that is not evidence of undisclosed generative AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CL category is plausible for transformer language modeling work.

missing-metadata.rationale: The real arXiv PDF provides title and abstract; incomplete PDF author extraction should not warn by itself.

overclaiming.rationale: Canonical research-paper phrasing should not warn without a high-risk anchored title or abstract claim.

manuscripts.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Language-model subject matter is not evidence of undisclosed AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CL category is plausible for language representation learning.

missing-metadata.rationale: The real arXiv PDF provides enough required metadata for this smoke pass.

overclaiming.rationale: Benchmark and performance claims are expected in abstracts when not absolute or promotional.

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: The paper studies language models; the title is not an AI-writing-disclosure signal.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CL category is plausible for few-shot language modeling.

missing-metadata.rationale: Extracted title and abstract are sufficient; missing extracted authors alone should not warn.

overclaiming.rationale: Few-shot learner wording is descriptive, not a submission-risk overclaim by itself.

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Vision transformer subject matter is not AI-writing-assistance evidence.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CV category is plausible for image recognition work.

missing-metadata.rationale: The PDF provides required title and abstract metadata.

overclaiming.rationale: The title is stylized but not a high-risk absolute submission claim.

manuscripts.title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Natural-language supervision is paper subject matter, not AI-writing-disclosure evidence.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CV category is plausible for visual model work.

missing-metadata.rationale: The PDF contains title and abstract metadata.

overclaiming.rationale: Transferability claims should not warn unless absolute or unsupported by anchor text.

manuscripts.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Large language model subject matter is not an AI-writing-assistance disclosure signal.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CL category is plausible for large-language-model adaptation.

missing-metadata.rationale: Extracted title and abstract are enough for required metadata readiness.

overclaiming.rationale: Efficiency claims should not warn without absolute anchored language.

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Generative-model subject matter is not evidence of generative AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/LG category is plausible for probabilistic generative modeling.

missing-metadata.rationale: The PDF provides required title and abstract fields.

overclaiming.rationale: Model naming and result discussion are not overclaiming without high-risk anchor phrases.

manuscripts.title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Image-synthesis subject matter is not a disclosure signal for AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CV category is plausible for image synthesis work.

missing-metadata.rationale: Title and abstract extraction is sufficient for this smoke pass.

overclaiming.rationale: High-resolution image synthesis wording is technical, not promotional by itself.

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: Prompting and reasoning subject matter is not evidence of undisclosed AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/CL category is plausible for language-model prompting.

missing-metadata.rationale: The PDF provides the required title and abstract for readiness checks.

overclaiming.rationale: The title makes a technical claim, not an absolute moderation-risk claim.

manuscripts.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs

ai-disclosure-risk.rationale: LLM subject matter is not evidence of undisclosed AI writing assistance.

category-fit.rationale: The selected CS/LG category is plausible for model finetuning methodology.

missing-metadata.rationale: Required title and abstract metadata are available.

overclaiming.rationale: Efficiency wording is acceptable unless paired with absolute unsupported claims.
